## Type of Change

- [ ] Curriculum clarity fix (typo, wording, explanation)

- [ ] Accessibility improvement

## Curriculum Safety / Child-Friendliness Check

<!-- Complete this section if you changed any lesson content. -->

- [ ] Written for ages 8–12
- [ ] Uses clear, concrete language — jargon is defined when introduced
- [ ] Avoids fear, shame, or manipulation as motivational devices
- [ ] Does not collect student data or add tracking
- [ ] Preserves the discussion-based format
- [ ] Stays politically neutral on contested topics
- [ ] Does not add commercial or advertising content
- [ ] Not applicable — this is a technical/infrastructure change

## Technical Check

- [ ] Builds locally without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] `validate:build` passes if present (`npm run validate:build`)
- [ ] Links work under GitHub Pages project paths (not root-relative)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion
- [ ] No tracking, login, analytics, or user accounts added
